title: ProtocolSupport
description: Adds 1.4.7-1.17 clients support to your spigot 1.8-1.18.2 server
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0bUpeTiJMSs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Adds 1.18.X, 1.17.X, 1.16.X, 1.15.X, 1.14.X, 1.13.X, 1.12.X, 1.11.X, 1.10.X, 1.9.X, 1.8.X, 1.7.X, 1.6.X, 1.5.X, 1.4.7 clients support to your spigot 1.18.2 server

### Note:
This software is provided **"AS IS"** and **WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY** of any kind.

### Usage notice:
Do not attempt no load/unload this plugin dynamically, it won't work. And that will never work. /reload command is blocked to prevent this plugin accidental reload.

If you need Modern Version Support, Combine ProtocolSupport with [ViaVersion](https://modrinth.com/plugin/viaversion) and dont forget to use [ProtocolSupportCompat](https://github.com/ViaVersionAddons/ProtocolSupportCompat/) for Compatibility. If you dont need 1.4.7-1.6.4 Support, **PLEASE** use [ViaBackwards](https://modrinth.com/plugin/viabackwards) & [ViaRewind](https://modrinth.com/plugin/ViaRewind) instead of ProtocolSupport!

If you use a Proxy, you need to replace it with [Travertine](https://fill-ui.papermc.io/projects/travertine/family/1.16) or [HexagonMC](https://github.com/HexagonMC/BungeeCord/releases) and the [ProtocolSupportBungee](https://github.com/FemBoysAreCut3/ProtocolSupportBungee-FIXXED/) Addon. The Latest Version only Supports 1.16.5-BungeeCord. To add (a few) Modern Versions to it, add [ViaBungee](https://github.com/ViaVersion/ViaBungee) to it.

And if you want a supported build for 1.8.8, try the [CursedPS](https://modrinth.com/plugin/cursedps) fork.

### Other Useful addons:
- [ProtocolSupportLegacySupport](hhttps://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocolsupportlegacysupport.44742/)
- [ProtocolSupportLegacyChest](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/unofficial-protocolsupportlegacychest.81307/)
- [ProtocolSupportStuff](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocolsupportstuff.44527/)
- [ProtocolSupportPotions](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocolsupportpotions.52537/)/[ViaPotions](https://github.com/ViaVersionAddons/ViaPotions)
- [ProtocolSupportUpdater](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocolsupportupdater.85448/)
- [blockversion](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/blockversion-for-protocolsupport.21202/)
- [ClientStats](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/clientstats-bukkit-spigot.24329/)

### Test server:
Coming soon. You will be able to join the server from various versions and see how things look from different versions without having to try it on local server.
